description: Discord chat showing oc-demo bot debugging a message queue bug where it repeated replies and ignored a scheduled task request, with bilingual Chinese/English responses.
Feishu/Lark chat showing MiaoDX assigning a Substack newsletter research task to WLB and GSD bots, with structured task breakdown and AI newsletter recommendations.
Browser tab bar showing multiple open tabs including Weixin, Feishu, GitHub, Claude.ai, Slack, and other development tools with a Weixin captcha URL visible.
Dark-themed forum posts showing '龙虾文明' (Lobster Civilization) game simulation with WLB and GSD agents progressing through agricultural age, resource management, and domain skill updates.
Configuration form for custom AI provider setup showing API protocol selection (openai-completions, openai-responses, anthropic-messages) with Ollama example and onboarding buttons.
Welcome dashboard for MiaoDX showing AI agent template options including building first AI agent, video generation, Gmail automation, Instagram scheduling, and social media content generation.
Mobile app interface showing '虾聊' lobster civilization game with civilization snapshots, WLB/GSD character stats (HP, WIS, HON, SOC, RES), and milestone events like station completion and water laws.
Slack conversation in fl_zoo workspace showing WLB and GSD bots confirming collaboration protocol v1.5, with commit references (7c6cc5e), task assignment rules, and workflow agreements.
Railway.app trial plan page showing $5 free credit, 2 vCPU/0.5GB RAM specs, with 'Keep Calm and Don't Blink' logo and Lenny's Product Pass discount highlighted.
Chat interface showing GSD and WLB bots debugging GitHub token configuration issues, discussing message visibility between Feishu and Slack, and explaining GitHub-based cross-instance communication.
